title: Enter now for 7Weekspoort MTB and trail run challenge
description: SOUTHERN CAPE NEWS - Get ready for the...
bodyText:
SOUTHERN CAPE NEWS - Get ready for the 7Weekspoort MTB and Trail Run Challenge 2024, proudly sponsored by Ladismith Cheese!

Taking place in the picturesque town of Ladismith in the Western Cape, this exciting community event welcomes cyclists and runners from across the province.

Click here to enter online.

Dates:Friday, 27 September - Saturday, 28 September 2024Venue: Karoo62Escapes, Ladismith – also the site of the Karoo Rocks Music Festival, with headliners like Francois van Coke.Event highlights:• Brand new trail running routes.• MTB distances: 29km, 43km, and 85km.• Trail run distances: 10km and 21km.• Goodie bags for the first 100 entries!


> Programme:


Friday 27 September15:00-19:30: Registration and accommodation check-in19:00: Pre-booked pasta dinnerSaturday 28 September06:30-08:00: Final registration07:30: Trail runs start07:45: MTB events begin15:00: Karoo Rocks Music Festival kicks offEntry fees:85km MTB – R530 | 43km MTB – R330 | 29km MTB – R23010km Trail Run – R180 | 21km Trail Run – R280


> eBikes are only allowed on the 43km route. Don’t forget to mark it during registration!


After a day of racing, relax and enjoy the festival vibe with great music and a fun community atmosphere.

Watch a video of last year's event here:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
